name: Sauteed Sturgeon with Vermouth Dill Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Sturgeon, sliced into thin fillets
recipeInstructions:
STEP ONE: Prepare the Vermouth Dill Sauce. In a saucepan, sauté shallots in 1 tablespoon of butter until softened. Add vermouth and dill; reduce to 1 tablespoon. Stir in fish stock and reduce again to 2 tablespoons. Whisk in cream and bring to a boil. Gradually add remaining butter, stirring constantly until smooth. Season with salt and pepper. Keep warm.
STEP TWO: Cook the sturgeon by sautéing each fillet in 2 tablespoons of butter for about 2 minutes on each side, or until lightly golden brown and cooked through.
STEP THREE: Serve the sturgeon on plates, garnishing with the Vermouth Dill Sauce.
